acceptance_criteria.text: Rollback from an active pattern card no longer executes on the first click.
proof: Rollback buttons open ip_rpc preview; legacy ip_rb is a preview alias.

acceptance_criteria.text: Telegram shows a rollback preview comparing current active version and target version before applying.
proof: Added core preview builder and Telegram preview renderer.

acceptance_criteria.text: Preview includes text, impact, bad rate, diff, warnings, and reason.
proof: Preview text includes current/target, impact counters, text diff, warnings, and selected reason.

acceptance_criteria.text: Superadmin must choose/confirm a rollback reason and press a separate confirm button before DB state changes.
proof: Reasons use ip_rbr; rollback runs only on ip_rbc confirm.

acceptance_criteria.text: Confirmation re-validates same industry/type and current active context before rollback.
proof: Confirm path re-runs rollback preview and blocks if can_confirm is false.

acceptance_criteria.text: Rollback writes a decision record and an impact timeline event.
proof: Rollback logs rollback_activate decision and admin_rollback impact event.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing version management remains backward-compatible with old ip_rb callbacks.
proof: ip_rb routes to preview, not direct rollback.

acceptance_criteria.text: Relevant local tests and production smoke checks pass.
proof: 84 local tests passed; production AST/smoke/restart/log checks passed.
gaps: Production image does not include pytest.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_industry_patterns.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py tests/test_service_problem_regeneration.py tests/test_worker_services_quality.py tests/test_content_plan_generation.py
server: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app python -B -c '<AST syntax check>'
server: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && curl -I http://localhost:8000
server: cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose logs --since 2m app worker --tail=160
known_gaps: Production image does not include pytest; server unit test command reports No module named pytest.
